lede_today: Re-read how your body feels before each task — not just once a day. A hard day has two pieces, and you can be fresh for the first but cooked for the second. The console weighs recovery, finger condition, schedule slot, and skin/CNS state and tells you whether to run your next task or back off.
lede_week: Three genuinely hard days — Mon, Wed, Sat. Tue/Thu/Fri are productive but low-CNS, hitting grip types and tissue that don't fight the hard days for recovery. Tick a day when it's done; your week progress and history update automatically.
lede_exercises: Every prescription with its full spec, what it actually trains, and tap-to-swap alternates that hit the same adaptation. Swapped picks are remembered and feed back into your week view. Filter by what you're training.
lede_metrics: The numbers that actually move at your level. Max finger force is near its ceiling for you — so we track rate of force development, contact strength, critical force, pinch, and pull. Log a value after a test; the sparkline shows your trend.
lede_log: Everything you've logged — recommended sessions, completed days, and test results — newest first.
lede_stats: What your logged sets add up to — progression and PRs per exercise, where your volume goes, training load over time, and how hard you're actually working.
lede_program: Reshape your weekly template — set each day's focus and its default exercises, and the block length. This applies to every week; per-week tweaks still live in the Week tab.
prog_periodization_desc: Shape load across the block. Each phase scales its weeks' prescriptions — intensity changes load, volume changes sets and rounds.
prog_no_phases: No phases — prescriptions run at 100% every week. Add a phase to periodize.
prog_warn_b2b: {a} & {b} are both high-CNS — no recovery gap between them.
prog_warn_norest: No rest day in the week — schedule at least one.
prog_warn_region: {region} is {pct}% of your volume — consider balancing.
footer_text: Built from: Eva López-Rivera (MAW/MED), Tyler Nelson / Camp4 (recruitment pulls, density hangs, wrist), Keith Baar (collagen loading), Eric Hörst & Lattice (frequency & periodization), Ferrer-Uris 2023 (sloper activation). Calibrated to advanced finger/pull strength — connective tissue is the assumed bottleneck. Not medical advice. Stop on any sharp or lingering finger pain.
log_empty: No sessions logged yet. Run the day recommender, tick a day, or log a marker test — it'll show up here.
import_confirm: Restoring a backup replaces all current data. Continue?
reset_confirm: Reset all saved progress, swaps, metrics and logs? This cannot be undone.
td_fatigue: Recent effort · RPE {rpe} — factored into today's read.
td_applies: This read is for your next task:
td_all_done: All tasks done for today — recover.
td_rest_day: Rest day — no training tasks. Recover.
login_subtitle: Sign in to your training console
lede_train: Run your session: a built-in interval timer for hangs and repeaters, and a log of what you actually did — weight, time, reps, and the rest you took on each set.
stats_empty: Log a workout in the Train tab to see your analytics here.
train_no_prev: No previous session for this day yet
train_nothing: Add at least one set to log a workout.
train_empty: No exercises today — add some in the Week tab, or it's a rest day.
welcome_sub: Tell us your goals and where you're at — we'll propose a starting protocol.
prop_week: Begin at Week 1 · Phase 1 — Capacity & Tissue Base.
prop_goal_boulder: Boulder-focused: weight the hard days toward power and limit problems.
prop_goal_sport: Sport-focused: protect the repeater and route days, and your weekend mileage.
prop_goal_all: All-round: keep the three hard days balanced across power, endurance and tissue.
prop_focus_fingers: Prioritise max finger work early — recruitment pulls and short max hangs — then express it on the wall. Keep volume conservative; finger gains are slow and injury-sensitive.
prop_focus_power: Lead with recruitment pulls into limit bouldering on hard days. Contact strength and rate of force development are your levers; rest fully between maximal efforts.
prop_focus_endurance: Build critical force with 7/3 repeaters and on-the-wall laps. Keep a strength base, but bias volume toward strength-endurance and aerobic capacity.
prop_focus_tissue: Start gentle: density hangs, low-load Abrahangs and antagonists, with maximal work kept minimal until tissues adapt. Raise intensity only as niggles settle.
lede_settings: Everything in one place — units and display, notifications, your program, your data, and your account.
set_units_desc: Switch between metric and imperial. Stored values convert automatically.
set_notify_desc: Get a heads-up when a rest timer finishes, even with the app in the background.
set_program_desc: Edit your weekly template and block length.
set_pw_error: Couldn't change password — check your current one.
set_delete_desc: Permanently delete your account and all training data. This cannot be undone.
set_delete_confirm: This permanently deletes your account and all data. Continue?
set_delete_error: Couldn't delete the account — check your password.
